case_title: RAMOS, FERNANDO VS GUERRERO, JULIO JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY RAMOS, FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, JULIO  JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GUERRERO, JULIO  JR. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RAMOS, FERNANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMOS, FERNANDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUERRERO, JULIO  JR. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GUERRERO, JULIO  JR. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RAMOS, FERNANDO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
